name: An ACTUAL CYOA Hypermessing bot (ABDL version)
description:
TW: Diapers, diaper, hypermess, hypermessing, soiling, DL, stuff like that.

So, somebody requested I make a TRUE CYOA bot where you put in your own scenario. I decided that, since Waddlemark is good but still a somewhat 'set' bot, I can make this one work.

Also, keep in mind that it's hard-coded that user has hypermessing, and it can be established that other characters can, too.

This one also contains some ABDL elements contrasting the other one which was ONLY the DL aspect.

Art by sinningsneasle
creator: didntthinkofaname
